---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for the Telco CRM Platform
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the proposed feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits (see personas in `docs/product/personas.md`)?

## Proposed solution

Describe the desired behavior.

## Scope and service impact

- Affected service(s):
- Architecture mode impact (ADR-004): none / Simple / CQRS+Mediator / Domain Orchestration
- New events or API changes (ADR-005, ADR-015, ADR-019):

## Requirement / roadmap linkage

- Related FR/NFR (see `docs/product/requirements.md`):
- Related phase/epic (see `docs/product/roadmap.md` and `.claude/roadmap/`):

## Acceptance criteria

```text
Given ...
When ...
Then ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches and why they were not chosen.

## ADR impact

Does this require a new or changed ADR? If so, which one?

## Additional context

Links, diagrams, or references.
